ELPAC Level 3
Lexile 1300–1400L
DTR | Listen to a Speaker Support an Opinion
LSO-MS6-L3-13001400-MSSCI6-TTM-IMR-02 | MS Science: Grade 6 | Plate Tectonics and Continental Drift | Time Travel Mission | Immigrant & Refugee Journeys
Carried Apart
Click 🎧 to listen.
Listen to a conversation between two students. The girl is discussing her opinion about continental drift. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer four questions about the conversation and the evidence the girl gives to support her opinion.
Listen to the Conversation
1 QUESTION 1:
Why does the girl talk about her own family?
2 QUESTION 2:
How did the girl learn about the matching fossils on the two continents?
3 QUESTION 3:
According to the girl, why are the matching fossils strong evidence?
4 QUESTION 4:
When the boy says Wegener was “ahead of his time,” what does he most likely mean?
Answer all 4 questions to submit.
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
